step_by_step_thinking:
I agree with the original conclusion. In addition, recent studies show that myocarditis can present even in asymptomatic fetuses, indicating early and widespread viral impact beyond neonatal symptoms—supporting its status as the leading observable lesion despite not always manifesting immediately after birth. This reinforces its significance relative to other less frequent findings like colitis or pulmonary cysts.

Answer: <B>
